templates.name: The Curiosity Opener
templates.subject: Quick question about {{company}}
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I noticed you've been at {{company}} for {{tenure}} — that's impressive staying power in {{industry}}.

I'm curious: are you still as excited about the problems you're solving as you were on day one, or has that itch for something new started?

No pitch, just a genuine question. If the timing's ever right, I'd love to share what's landing on my desk that might surprise you.

Best,
{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Market Intel Hook
templates.subject: Something interesting about {{industry}} salaries
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I just finished a deep dive into {{industry}} compensation trends — and the data is wild. {{seniorityLevel}} roles like yours are commanding 20-35% more than 18 months ago.

Thought you'd want to know where you stand, even if you're not looking. Happy to share the full breakdown.

Cheers,
{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Mutual Connection Warm-Up
templates.subject: {{mutualConnection}} mentioned your name
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your name came up in a conversation with a mutual connection in the {{industry}} space. They spoke highly of your work at {{company}}, especially around {{skill}}.

I'm working with a company that's solving a similar problem but at a completely different scale. Would love 10 minutes to share — even if just for your take on it.

Best,
{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Career Growth Angle
templates.subject: Your next move in {{industry}}
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I've been tracking career trajectories of top {{role}} professionals, and I notice a pattern: the ones who make the biggest leaps do it around the 2-3 year mark at their current company.

You're right in that window at {{company}}. I have something that could be your springboard — a {{seniorityLevel}} role that's been impossible to fill because the bar is so high.

Worth a 15-min chat?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Problem-Solver Pitch
templates.subject: I think I found the fix for {{painPoint}}
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I work with a lot of {{seniorityLevel}} folks in {{industry}}, and the #1 frustration I hear is {{painPoint}}.

I'm guessing you've felt that too at {{company}}. One of my clients just solved this problem in a way I haven't seen before — and they're looking for someone with exactly your background to help scale it.

Interested in hearing more?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Exclusive Opportunity
templates.subject: Confidential: {{seniorityLevel}} role, hand-picked for you
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm reaching out selectively to a very short list of {{industry}} professionals for a confidential {{seniorityLevel}} opportunity.

The company is pre-IPO, well-funded, and the role reports directly to the {{executiveTitle}}. Your background at {{company}} is exactly what they described as their ideal.

I can share more details on a quick call if you're open to it. No pressure either way.

Regards,
{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Industry Mover
templates.subject: {{industry}} is about to change — here's how
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I spend my days talking to leaders across {{industry}}, and I'm seeing a massive shift happening right now. Companies are rethinking how they approach {{trendTopic}}, and the ones moving first are snapping up talent like you.

One of those companies just asked me to find their next {{role}}. The vision is genuinely exciting.

Would you be open to a conversation, even if only to hear what's happening in the market?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Direct & Honest Approach
templates.subject: Straight talk about a {{role}} role
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'll skip the fluff: I'm a recruiter, I have a {{seniorityLevel}} {{role}} role that pays well and has real impact, and your profile at {{company}} is exactly what the hiring manager described.

If you're happy where you are — great, I respect that. But if there's even a 10% chance you'd explore something new, let's talk for 10 minutes.

No games, no pressure.

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Culture Sell
templates.subject: What if work didn't feel like work?
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I know this sounds like recruiter-speak, but hear me out: I just placed someone at this company and they told me it's the first time in their career they actually look forward to Monday.

They're growing fast in {{industry}}, the team is brilliant, and they need a {{role}} who can match that energy. Your work at {{company}} tells me you might be that person.

Worth a chat?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Skill Spotlight
templates.subject: Your {{skill}} expertise caught my attention
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I came across your profile and your depth in {{skill}} really stood out. Not many people in {{industry}} have that combination of hands-on expertise and {{seniorityLevel}}-level thinking.

I'm working with a company that specifically needs someone who can bridge that gap. It's a rare kind of role — and so is your skill set.

Could we connect for a brief chat this week?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Competitor Move
templates.subject: Your competitors are making moves
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I've placed 3 people from companies like {{company}} in the last quarter alone. There's a reason top {{industry}} talent is moving right now — and I think you should know what they're moving toward.

One role in particular stands out for your background. {{seniorityLevel}} level, strong equity, and a problem worth solving.

Want to hear more?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Follow-Up Nudge
templates.subject: Re: Quick question about {{company}}
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

Just bumping this in case it got buried. I know inboxes are brutal.

The short version: I have a {{role}} opportunity that maps perfectly to your experience at {{company}}. Happy to share details in a quick call, or if you prefer, I can send over a one-pager.

Either way, no pressure.

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Value-Add Follow-Up
templates.subject: Thought you'd find this useful
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I came across this {{industry}} report and immediately thought of your work at {{company}}. Some fascinating insights on where {{skill}} is heading.

[Link to resource]

Also — that {{role}} role I mentioned is still open. The hiring manager specifically asked if I'd heard back from you. Take that as a compliment.

Let me know if you'd like to chat.

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Executive Whisperer
templates.subject: A conversation between leaders
templates.text:
{{firstName}},

At your level, you don't need another recruiter pitch — you need a trusted advisor who understands the landscape.

I specialize in {{seniorityLevel}} placements across {{industry}}, and I'm currently advising on a transformative role: {{role}} at a company redefining how {{industry}} works.

The CEO personally asked me to identify candidates. Your track record at {{company}} is precisely what they're looking for.

I'd welcome a confidential conversation at your convenience.

Regards,
{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Junior Talent Spotter
templates.subject: I see big things ahead for you
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I know you're early in your {{industry}} career, but your profile at {{company}} shows something most people at your level don't have: real initiative.

I'm working with a company that's built their culture around developing high-potential talent like you. The role is {{role}}, and it comes with mentorship, fast-track growth, and a team you'd genuinely learn from.

Want to hear more? No commitment needed.

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Healthcare Specialist
templates.subject: The future of patient care needs people like you
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

Healthcare is at an inflection point. The intersection of {{skill}} and patient outcomes is where the real breakthroughs are happening — and that's exactly where your expertise at {{company}} shines.

I'm partnering with a {{seniorityLevel}} team that's building something genuinely transformative. They need a {{role}} who understands both the clinical and technical sides.

Would love to share more. 15 minutes?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Finance Power Move
templates.subject: Your next chapter in finance
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

The financial services landscape is shifting fast — AI, regulation changes, and new market dynamics are creating roles that didn't exist 2 years ago.

One of my clients — a top-tier {{industry}} firm — just created a {{seniorityLevel}} {{role}} position and your background at {{company}} is exactly the profile they described.

Compensation is highly competitive. Interested in a confidential chat?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Remote Work Angel
templates.subject: What if location didn't matter?
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I noticed you're based in {{location}} — and I know the {{industry}} talent market there can feel limited.

What if I told you there's a {{seniorityLevel}} {{role}} role that's fully remote, pays top-of-market, and lets you work with a world-class team without relocating?

It's real, and your profile at {{company}} is a strong match. Want the details?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Startup Pitch
templates.subject: Ground floor. Big equity. Real impact.
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

Most people at {{company}} are comfortable — and that's fine. But if you've ever wondered what it's like to be employee #{{employeeNumber}} at a rocketship, I have something worth hearing.

Series {{fundingStage}} funded, backed by top VCs, solving a real problem in {{industry}}. They need a {{role}} who can build, not just maintain.

Your background screams builder. Am I right?

{{senderName}}

templates.name: The Breakup Message
templates.subject: Closing the loop
templates.text:
Hi {{firstName}},

I've reached out a couple of times and haven't heard back — which is totally fine. You're busy, and I respect that.

I'm going to close your file for now, but if you ever want to explore what's out there in the {{industry}} space, my door is always open.

Wishing you all the best at {{company}}.

{{senderName}}
